rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped literature-list citation on behavioral/quantitative marketing work (specifically under bounded rationality), without a distinct discussion of its findings or framework. The citing paper does not rely on this specific study for hypothesis development, model construction, measurement, or empirical interpretation. Its core modeling choices are tied to other directly discussed sources (e.g., QRE foundations), so this citation functions as background positioning rather than a meaningful building block.
